First Nations Housing Co-op Inc.
description:
Told me that the wait list is to long and applications are no longer being accepted.
I guess they should close down shop than.
Why have someone awnser calls just to tell people you cant help them.

Very interesting experience learning about the Native Indians. If however you have trouble walking, it is probably a place you would not want to go to.

They try to help many people it would be good if they could receive government assistance.

Visiting family

Native coop housing

name: Maryvale Adolescent & Family Services
description:
Dr fortuna is an uncaring, ignorant and irrespsonsible dr. He was my family doctor prior to entering maryvale and still is though he will never rebook check ups with me despite my failing health. He didnt listen to me or ever take me serious. Never offered an olive banch or suggested anything to help me when my health was deteriorating. Needless to say I need a new doctor.
When i was 17 maryvale forced me into renting my own apartment I could hardly afford with my very limited budget from cas. I had no help finding a job. I had no connections as my family abandoned me and i knew noone in the area. I had little knowledge of the area in general. The only reason I am alive today is because christians I ran into saved my life by teaching me the basics of living alone.
The only positive thing I have to say is im glad I at least got an escape from my abusive adoptive parents.

My son tried to commit suicide in my care and I bring him to the hospital, the hospital transfers care to Mary valean hour and a half drive from us. two days later Dr,  meets with my son, less than 1 hour later determines he’s not suicidal and sends him home this is the second time my son has been there for the same issues This time they portrayed me as the issue!it really feels like they just pushes kids through the system instead of actually helping them!   Very disappointing. The next time he tries  to self harm what am I to do!  Not going back to this joke of a place!  Contacting the proper authorities to address this Dr. And this places policies.

Who knew that a Cisco ringtone could trigger ptsd from this place. (Saxophone 1)
Also if you wanted to escape, bring a Philips screwdriver.

name: Craigwood Youth Services
description:
I was once cursorated at Woodview back in 2012 for a long stay and before that was in and out probably 7 times. The staff that was their at the time helped me so much and I am who I am today because of them. I really wish I could get in touch with the people who once helped me their. I would love to chat with them and see how they are doing and thanking them for helping me when I was at my worst... Please of you where working at woodveiw female detention center in Ailsa Craig back between 2010-2012 please contact me I would love to reach out to a few of you. Thanks .

A shameful representation of those meant to help the broken and downtrodden. People here will focus more on a phantom problem rather than education and the innocence of youth. If your children are problematic, do not give up on them, nurture and love them.

name: Changing Ways (London) Inc.
description:
I just finished a twelve week program with changing ways.  My councillor Mason was Amazing .  He was patient and at the same time bound to his job and the court system to make us bound to our responsibility.  He balanced it to a “T”.  Really changed so many thoughts and gave me good tools for my relationships and life moving forward.  Thank you Changing ways and thank you Mason and Hannah

Trying to find the link for zoom meeting I was not sent it for today's meeting. I was expecting someone to call me but I didn't recieve a call or text either.     I work two jobs last thing I need is this to affect my time.  Hoping someone will contact me regarding my zoom meetings thank you.

My response to the owner: No that's unacceptable. This place should be keeping track of who they aren't able to connect with. And do you think it's safe for my friend to contact you, when she's constantly being terrorized by the person you are enabling? She can't go on her phone without him checking it all the time. You don't even realize it was him who responded to the initial contact via text, not my friend.

This place enables men to do more harm to their partner. My friend's significant other had to go here by a court mandate, and his behavior has gotten much worse and way more controlling. He constantly uses what he's allegedly learned here to belittle my friend, and it seems like they don't teach people what personal responsibility is.

My friend has had no follow up from this place at all to check in to see how she's doing, how her SO is behaving around her, etc. None. So they're not even getting any feedback at all about their classes and their impact, but I bet they're giving the courts or his lawyer a passing grade or whatever it's called. I cannot believe how easily fooled these counselors are.

I Am just finishing my 12 Weeks and I think that this program is Beneficial if you find that you are having problems in your relationship I.E.  More arguing than normal,  Distrust,  insecurity, or even if you just want a reminder of what helped you get involved with the person your with..  I find that everyone has it in them to be respectful to your spouse and to keep the lines of communication open, However I also find that after awhile we all tend to forget who we are and the Values that got us the person we are with and this is a good refresher course for anyone that may forget who they are or who your spouse is/

I am currently in the voluntary group and it has changed my life I was split from my wife for almost a year and we are back together now and it is going really well. I still attend weekly and learn more tools every week

name: Youth Opportunities Unlimited – Youth Action Centre
description:
YOU is a corporate scam. They say they're going to help you but then they proceed not to. I've been involved with them for 7 years and get no help. They wait for you to achieve what they're supposed to help you with on your own and then they take the success and paint it as their own "Successful YOU story".

I have BEGGED many times for help and they say they will but never do. They do not care about you. They just feed off your success.

The only workers I've had that actually did their job was Terrell King and Eric Jensen. Lovely people who really care about their caseloads. They deserve a raise (Not Terrell, he realized his worth and left YOU!!)

I was walking with my mother by the north side York Street entrance (west of Richmond) and she ended up with a really bad headache from all the marijuana smoke coming from a group of kids outside. Honestly, it’s unacceptable. There are supposed to be rules against this—city bylaws don’t allow smoking right at entrances, and yet it’s happening openly. What’s worse, I saw young kids smoking out of bongs and other paraphernalia while their own children sat in strollers right beside them. Y.O.U. is supposed to be about creating positive opportunities for youth, but this just sets a terrible example. There needs to be some enforcement here because this is beyond unacceptable.

I have to say that Youth Opportunities Unlimited is an incredible company because of how they give such fantastic  guidance to the people that are going through the many programs that are offered at YOU.  The people in the programs are given the opportunity to be able to turn their lives around and give them such hope and confidence in themselves.

They're awesome and the workers are so cheerful ... The one councellor jus made me smile lol

Grate place, super helpful too. They are awsome with people with disabilities. Definetly would recomend

name: EQUAY-WUK (WOMEN'S GROUP)
NATIVE WOMEN'S RESOURCE CENTRE OF TORONTO
description:
Most amazing woman I have ever met. So very very kind and helpful. Thank you for all you do!!

They helped me a lot with diapers and food bank, plus I love learning new native songs at their hand drumming classes every Wednesday evening :)

They are very  helpful and resources are there for us . I'm pleased with how they helpfulness in getting what I need for my son an I.

They are good people helping their community be a good and healthy place..and I for one am grateful that it is a part of our community,thanks NWR for all that you do...

It's a great food bank and they are real good worker's and help you out with close and with great resources to help you with

name: OAKVILLE DISTRESS CENTRE
TELECARE CAMBRIDGE DISTRESS CENTRE
CRISIS RESPONSE SERVICES (Kenora Rainy River District)
THE SALVATION ARMY SUICIDE PREVENTION SERVICES
description:
On or about December 7th I began to feel unwell, alot of abdominal pain ... This escalated dramatically over the following two days, so I decided to go to general hospital.. on the 9th around 11 pm... It was to the point where I could barely walk ..  Well the 9th was my Christmas hamper pick up day, and given the circumstances was unable to go, let alone remember the day of the week... When I was released from the hospital two days later with ecoli bacteria infection amongst other things, was told to take it easy for a cpl days, rest and let the meds so their job . So on the 17th I went in to the salvation army with a friend who had an appointment, (place was empty btw, one other person) and spoke to a worker there and explained my situation and asked if I could get the hamper that day since they weren't busy, and well because I was already there.?? No ma'am u missed it call and book a food bank appointment for January or February.... Well maam this is a hamper pick up for Christmas... Not my problem she says... So needless to say I never got my hamper and I could have used it 10000% ... So now what do I do... ??
Not my problem ... That's what hurts. Zero compassion zero care for another human being... Disrespectful as far as I'm concerned, I even had proof... If that was me on the other side of the desk, your damn right the person would have got the hamper and prob extra... Some people are rude.    Left in tears. My friend ended up giving me some of her stuff she got.. that's kindness in humanity right there, she didn't have too but she did. And didn't even hesitate. .
I will not b returning there no matter how much I need their help... Bs

80 Bay St. Mission Services is a food bank by appointment which provides people with basic food stuffs once a month.

For being an individual receiving food and or possible info that pretaining to your situation. decent quantity of food and can be somewhat of a non-busy place to get cat and dog food. register with basic info about yourself or family with a fixed address for your profile. located On bay going north on bay with a small parking lot so I hope some people can be indulged on for qualifying persons in need of this place and the services.

The volunteers Good. It's just that none of them are knowledgeable about the people with allergies. Some of them need to do some research on their own about it but the atmosphere was good and everything else was good so I have no photos. Don't like photos anyways
